inputs.label: Power Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Average power consumption of the device or system in kilowatts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average power consumption of the device or system in kilowatts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cihazın veya sistemin kilovat cinsinden ortalama güç tüketimi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Leistungsaufnahme des Geräts oder Systems in Kilowatt.

inputs.label: Usage per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of hours the device is used per day, on average.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of hours the device is used per day, on average.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cihazın günde ortalama kullanıldığı saat sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Nutzungsdauer des Geräts pro Tag in Stunden.

inputs.label: Days per Month
inputs.businessContext: Number of days per month the device is operated.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days per month the device is operated.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Tage pro Monat, an denen das Gerät betrieben wird.

inputs.label: Number of Devices
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical devices operating under the same conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical devices operating under the same conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aynı koşullar altında çalışan özdeş cihaz sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl identischer Geräte, die unter gleichen Bedingungen betrieben werden.

inputs.label: Cost per kWh
inputs.businessContext: Electricity tariff rate per kilowatt-hour (in the local currency).

businessContext_i18n.en: Electricity tariff rate per kilowatt-hour (in the local currency).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilovat-saat başına elektrik tarifesi (yerel para birimi cinsinden).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
